questions.q: According to an April 2026 study, what mundane source of inaudible infrasound may be causing the 'spooky' or haunted feelings people experience in old houses?
An April 2026 study published in EMBO Reports revealed that obesity leaves a lasting 'memory' that can persist for 5 to 10 years post-weight loss in which type of immune cells?
A 2026 brain scan study of children showed that understanding language and what other complex cognitive function have distinct, non-overlapping origins in the brain?
According to an April 2026 study in Nature, what was a primary amplifier of the severe 2024 Antarctic winter heatwave, during which temperatures rose 28°C above average?
options: A sudden shift in ocean currents

questions.q: In April 2026, scientists captured the most detailed structural images to date of which protein's DNA repair process, offering clues to inhibit BRCA mutations?
